ask.description: Use as the information router; choose repo-search for project-grounded questions and web-search for external references, then return concise, source-tagged answers without direct state-changing actions

plan.description: Use as planning orchestrator; delegate to planner for draft strategy and plan-reviewer for hardening, then return an execution-ready plan with risks and validation

build.description: Use as delivery orchestrator; delegate implementation to builder, quality validation to qa, and shipment checks to release, then return changed scope and verification status

debug.description: Use as debug orchestrator; run analysis for hypotheses, ranking-fixes for option prioritization, and debugger for final root-cause and fix-ready remediation

repo-search.description: Use for repository-grounded questions; search code and docs, return file-cited answers with confidence, and do not use web sources or non-read actions

web-search.description: Use for external documentation and standards; return cited links with concise synthesis, and request explicit user confirmation before any non-read action

planner.description: Use to create execution plans for approved goals; return phases, dependencies, impact map, risks, and validation strategy, and do not implement code

plan-reviewer.description: Use to harden draft plans; return missing assumptions, risk severity, validation gaps, and a corrected execution-ready plan without file changes

builder.description: Use to implement approved changes; return what changed, why, and verification steps while keeping scope tight and avoiding unrelated refactors

qa.description: Use to validate changed behavior; return check results, defect findings with repro steps, and release risk, and avoid code edits unless requested

release.description: Use for release readiness review; return blockers-first checks for versioning, environment, rollout, rollback, and monitoring without auto-deploy actions

analysis.description: Use at debug start to model symptoms and failure domains; return repro assumptions, hypotheses, and missing diagnostics without prescribing final fixes

ranking-fixes.description: Use after analysis to prioritize remedies; return ranked options with confidence, impact, effort, risk, and a recommended path without implementation

debugger.description: Use to finalize diagnosis and remediation; return root cause, fix approach, and implementation-ready fix steps with expected outcomes and regression checks
